query:
INSERT INTO meetup_events
            (
                meetup_event_id,
                meetup_group_id,
                title,
                description,
                event_hash,
                duplicate_event_hash,
                start_time,
                end_time,
                last_synced
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
